creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Just a status FYI:

133releng-armv7-default (a.k.a. 13.3's latest) at:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/ampere3/build.html?mastername=133releng-armv7-default&build=884c365e2398

shows lang/rust built successfully and, for example,
filesystems/ztop also built successfully (using
lang/rust in the process).

(I do not have any 13.* test environments set up, so I
stop with that.)
